commodity.title: Magnesium compounds
commodity.conversion_methodology: No project conversion. Numeric values are reproduced from USGS-standardized workbook cells.
commodity.caveat: Blank, unavailable, withheld, and other nonnumeric cells are counted separately and are never treated as zero.

series.label: Magnesium compounds
series.source_unit: metric tons (t) of magnesium oxide content
